backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing expenses with CRUD operations, filters, totals, and category/date aggregations backed by a Map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing features, related files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries of many frontend components, screens, utilities, and charts.
frontend/ARCHITECTURE.md: Documentation describing the frontend structure, design philosophy, components, hooks, utilities, and backend interface.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based OKLCH theme tokens, color system, and dark mode variables for the application’s UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry file setting the app title to Monet Tracker and loading the React bundle.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app wiring up theme provider, router, routes, and global toaster notifications.
frontend/src/components/charts/MonthlySp: Recharts line chart showing monthly spending trends with formatted dates and currency.
frontend/src/components/charts/WeeklySpe: Recharts bar chart showing daily spending for a week using the chart-2 color token.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Catego: Displays a sorted list of expense categories with totals and percentage bars, including loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Totals: Shows total spent, transaction count, and average per day with loading placeholders.
frontend/src/components/expenses/DeleteE: Confirmation dialog for deleting an expense, showing its details and triggering deletion via a hook.
frontend/src/components/expenses/EditExp: Dialog that wraps an ExpenseForm to update an existing expense using a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/expenses/Expense: Renders dropdown filters for time period and category, updating parent filter state.
Form for creating or editing an expense with validation, category selection, and submission handling.
Displays a sortable table of expenses with edit and delete actions plus loading and empty states.
Defines the main app layout with header, navigation, content outlet, and footer.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Top navigation bar linking to key routes with active-state highlighting.
frontend/src/constants/expenseCategories: Defines the list of selectable expense categories with value/label pairs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useExpenses.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch, create, update, and delete expenses through the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity context/provider handling login, stored identities, and AuthClient setup.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind styles and theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with React, QueryClientProvider, and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/screens/AddExpenseScreen.ts: UI for adding a new expense using a form and mutation hook, with success/error handling.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Displays weekly or monthly expense insights with charts and totals based on filtered expense data.
frontend/src/screens/ExpenseListScreen.t: Renders a filter panel and list of expenses, applying category and time‑window filters.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Shows appearance settings including theme toggle and an about section.
frontend/src/utils/aggregations.ts: Functions to sum expenses and group them by day or category.
frontend/src/utils/dateRanges.ts: Provides helpers for week/month ranges, day labels, and filtering expenses by date/category.
frontend/src/utils/expenseMapping.ts: Maps amounts and notes between UI and backend formats and formats currency and dates.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, content scanning paths, extended color system using CSS variables, custom animations, and typography/container/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s state, metadata, requirements, and feature list for a student-focused expense tracker app with simple calculations and no payment processing.
